column1: Table 3. State Counts for Fentanyl and Fentanyl-Related Compounds: 2020
Counts of fentanyl and fentanyl-related compounds submitted to laboratories from January 1, 2020, through December 31, 2020, and analyzed by March 31, 2021
Source: U.S. Drug Enforcement Administration, Diversion Control Division, National Forensic Laboratory Information System, 2021. Data generated: July 21, 2021.

Suggested Citation: U.S. Drug Enforcement Administration, Diversion Control Division. (2021). Table 3. State counts for fentanyl and fentanyl-related compounds: 2020. Retrieved from the NFLIS Publications page at https://www.nflis.deadiversion.usdoj.gov/publicationsRedesign.xhtml
